steps.title: Read the point from the graph
steps.content:
The point shown is $$(49,0)$$.
This means the x‑coordinate (Player 1 points) is 49 and the y‑coordinate (Player 2 points) is 0.

steps.title: Interpret in context
steps.content:
When Player 1 earns 49 points, Player 2 earns 0 points.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
